message:
chore(mermaid): update Gantt pipeline stages (bd-30t8a)

Mark Gantt IR and Render stages as Done now that normalize_ast_to_ir
handles GanttTitle/GanttSection/GanttTask and render_gantt() renders
titles, sections, and task bars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2108,10 +2108,10 @@ pub const DIAGRAM_FAMILY_REGISTRY: &[DiagramFamilyEntry] = &[
         support_level: MermaidSupportLevel::Partial,
         is_beta: false,
         pipeline: [
+            StageStatus::Done,
             StageStatus::Done,
             StageStatus::Partial,
-            StageStatus::Partial,
-            StageStatus::Partial,
+            StageStatus::Done,
             StageStatus::Partial,
             StageStatus::NotStarted,
             StageStatus::NotStarted,
